summary: Clear audience recording of a unique City Island venue captures an OK Dead performance despite minor first‑set sound hiccups.
review: The crowd‑sourced tape is praised for its overall clarity and balanced mix, letting every instrument be heard even though set 1 suffered some sound issues that shortened it. Reviewers love the distinctive setting – the bridge, Capitol view, and island backdrop – and consider the show enjoyable if not spectacular.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is described as merely “ok” while recording quality is called excellent/good; weighting these yields a mid‑range rating around 3½ with moderate confidence from three consistent reviews.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear and balanced, everyone audible; some sound issues in set 1 caused a shortened segment but overall the tape sounds solid.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Performance described as average/ok; reviewers focus more on the unique venue atmosphere than musical peaks, noting the show was enjoyable in its setting.
